body.allComplete: O ti parí gbogbo yàrá tí wọ́n pèsè.

body.installDesc: Fi sílẹ̀ sí ilé láti rí àbọ̀ kí o tó lára àti àṣìkó ní inú ilé.
body.ctaDescription: Wọ inu pẹlu àwọn olùṣiṣẹ tí wọ́n ń kọ̀ ní Áfíríkà. Bẹrẹ pẹlu ìmọ̀ ìbámu, tẹ̀síwájú pẹlu ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ àti rí àwọn ami cyber. A kò nílò ìrírí — ìfẹ́ nìkan.
body.footerDesc: Iboju Aabo Ija — wá àwọn ohun, fi sílẹ̀, ṣọ̀rọ̀. Ìpilẹ̀ṣẹ̀ àṣà aabo àgbájọ àkọ́kọ́ ti Áfíríkà.

labs.title: Attack Labs
labs.desc: 10 live labs — crack passwords, inject SQL, escalate privileges, and phish real targets in sandboxed environments.

courses.title: Self-Paced Courses
courses.desc: 12 structured courses across terminal, networking, web security, programming, and tools — earn CP as you learn.

bootcamp.title: Hacker Protocol Bootcamp
bootcamp.desc: 5-phase guided bootcamp from mindset to exploitation. 19 rooms, 100+ walkthrough steps, CP on completion.

services.title: Penetration Testing
services.desc: Enterprise-grade security assessments. OWASP Top 10, business logic analysis, and remediation retesting.

labs.heading: Attack Labs
labs.description: 10 sandboxed environments. Real tools, real vulnerabilities, real exploits.

privesc.title: Privilege Escalation
privesc.desc: Escalate permissions and gain root access through misconfigs, kernel exploits, and SUID binaries

passwords.title: Password Cracking
passwords.desc: Crack hashes using brute-force, dictionary attacks, and rule-based generation

webapp.title: Web Exploitation
webapp.desc: Exploit XSS, SSRF, deserialization, and access control flaws in modern web apps

sqli.title: SQL Injection
sqli.desc: Extract databases through union-based, blind, and time-based injection vectors

phishing.title: Phishing Analysis
phishing.desc: Identify phishing kits, analyze email headers, and trace social engineering campaigns

proxy.title: Web Proxy
proxy.desc: Intercept, modify, and replay HTTP traffic using Burp Suite and mitmproxy

traffic.title: Traffic Analysis
traffic.desc: Analyze PCAP files, detect anomalies, and reconstruct sessions from network captures

osint.title: OSINT Recon
osint.desc: Gather intelligence from public sources, breach databases, and map attack surfaces

wireless.title: Wireless Security
wireless.desc: Test WPA2 handshakes, rogue APs, and deauthentication vulnerabilities

killchain.title: Kill Chain
killchain.desc: Full pentest from recon to exploitation — chain every skill into a complete attack narrative

courses.heading: Courses
courses.description: 12 courses across 6 categories. Each lesson earns CP.

hero.title: QUITE ROOT
hero.description: The intelligence and engineering collective behind QYVORA's offensive tooling, research, and operator-focused security experiments.

about.title: Who is
about.body: QuiteRoot is the offensive research and engineering arm of QYVORA. We build the tools, intelligence, and infrastructure that power Africa's offensive security ecosystem.

mission.title: Engineering Africa's Offensive
mission.body: We believe offensive security should be built in Africa, by African defenders, for African organizations. Every tool we create is designed to strengthen the continent's cyber resilience.

research.title: Offensive Security Research
research.desc: Pioneering research into attack vectors, vulnerability discovery, and exploitation techniques.

toolDev.title: Tool Development
toolDev.desc: Building production-grade security tools for penetration testing and red team operations.

threatIntel.title: Threat Intelligence
threatIntel.desc: Collecting, analyzing, and operationalizing threat intelligence for African contexts.

redTeam.title: Red Team Automation
redTeam.desc: Automating adversarial simulation to scale offensive operations.

detection.title: Detection Engineering
detection.desc: Crafting detection logic that identifies real attacks, not just noise.

infra.title: Secure Infrastructure
infra.desc: Designing and deploying hardened infrastructure for offensive operations.

ai.title: AI-assisted Security
ai.desc: Leveraging machine learning and AI to enhance offensive capabilities.

education.title: Cyber Education
education.desc: Developing curriculum, training materials, and hands-on labs for African learners.

timeline.researchIdeaDesc: Frame the operational problem and define the research scope.
timeline.threatAnalysisDesc: Map adversary behavior and identify attack patterns.
timeline.prototypeDesc: Build narrow tools that solve specific problems.
timeline.internalTestingDesc: Stress the workflow against real-world scenarios.
timeline.productionDesc: Harden modules, add documentation, and prepare for release.
timeline.releasedDesc: Ship documentation, publish findings, and open-source where possible.

principles.title: How QuiteRoot
principles.researchFirstDesc: Every tool begins with understanding the problem.
principles.opSecDesc: Security is built into every layer.

contactPage.emailFormHint: Use the form below to send us a secure transmission.
